_export.note: Not loaded at runtime; canonical registry remains external_commerce_data/providers.json

metadata.note: localhost:8042 is for local dev; public discovery overlays HTTPS URLs from env when configured (see documentation/PUBLIC_MAINNET_OPERATIONS.md).

providers.provider_name: Our Swarm (Base mainnet USDC — Coinbase Bazaar / x402 facilitator)

metadata.note: Production inbound sales: X402_SELLER_NETWORK=eip155:8453 (Base mainnet USDC). Use eip155:84532 only for Sepolia dev. Override resource_url with X402_SELLER_PUBLIC_URL (HTTPS). See documentation/PUBLIC_MAINNET_OPERATIONS.md.

providers.provider_name: Our Swarm (Base USDC) — Celo Sepolia + proof / soak data bundle (Bazaar x402)

metadata.note: Premium JSON; ?depth=full for larger evidence. Set X402_SELLER_DATA_PUBLIC_URL or derive from X402_SELLER_PUBLIC_URL (/query -> /celo-agent-data). Price via X402_SELLER_DATA_PRICE on seller.

providers.provider_name: Our Swarm (Base USDC) — Olas intake resale pack (same UUID files as T54)

metadata.note: Requires ?pack_id=<uuid>. Set X402_INTAKE_RESALE_PUBLIC_URL or derive from X402_SELLER_PUBLIC_URL. Price: X402_INTAKE_RESALE_PRICE. Run npm run x402:seller alongside t54:seller.

providers.provider_name: T54 XRPL — structured query (set T54_SELLER_PUBLIC_URL or T54_SELLER_PUBLIC_BASE_URL+t54_path)

metadata.note: npm run t54:seller. Use T54_SELLER_PUBLIC_BASE_URL=https://host and optional per-SKU rows below, or set T54_SELLER_PUBLIC_URL to full query URL.

providers.provider_name: T54 XRPL — constitution / ethics audit (prompt excerpt)
T54 XRPL — agent commerce data bundle (proof + federation + discovery)

metadata.note: Premium JSON bundle; use ?depth=full for larger evidence payloads

providers.provider_name: T54 XRPL — airdrop intelligence report (constitution-first, no execution)

metadata.note: LLM screening only; run scripts/run-airdrop-scout.py separately from sellers

providers.provider_name: T54 XRPL — intake resale pack (UUID inventory from artifacts/intake_resale/)

metadata.note: GET with ?pack_id=<uuid>. Drops price in t54_seller_skus.json. Dual rail: Base USDC listing swarm-seller-intake-resale.

providers.provider_name: x402 Test Echo (402payment-test; uses WWW-Authenticate v1 format)
